zh.Stockton, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可斯托克頓
zh.Stockton, Norfolk, England, United Kingd: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可斯托克頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Bigod於大約1285年出生在英國諾福爾可斯托克頓時，他的父親John le Bigod42歲，母親Isabel21歲。他於大約1306年與Idonia Hertford結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1332年5月12日之前在英國越可爾澤特林頓。

zh-hans.Stockton, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可斯托克頓
zh-hans.Stockton, Norfolk, England, United Kingd: 英国英格兰諾福爾可斯托克頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph Bigod于大约1285年出生在英国諾福爾可斯托克頓时，他的父亲John le Bigod42岁，母亲Isabel21岁。他于大约1306年与Idonia Hertford结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1332年5月12日之前在英国越可爾澤特林頓。

nameMeanings.name: Bigod
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Jaroslaw, Jozef, Krystyna, Slawomir.

Polish and Jewish (from Poland): from bigos, formerlydenoting anything that was chopped or slashed, now a particular dishcomposed of hash and sauerkraut; also ‘confusion’; hence perhaps anickname for someone who caused confusion.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Bigod was born about 1285, in Stockton, Norfolk, England, his father, John le Bigod, was 42 and his mother, Isabel, was 21. He married Idonia Hertford about 1306. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died before 12 May 1332, in Settrington, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Bigod est né environ 1285, à Stockton, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, John le Bigod, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Isabel, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Idonia Hertford environ 1306. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé avant 12 mai 1332, à Settrington, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph Bigod um 1285 in Stockton, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John le Bigod 42 und seine Mutter Isabel 21. Er hat um 1306 Idonia Hertford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb vor 12. Mai 1332 in Settrington, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Bigod è nato il circa 1285 nel Stockton, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, John le Bigod, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Isabel, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Idonia Hertford circa 1306. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì prima del 12 maggio 1332, nel Settrington, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Bigodが約1285年にイギリスノーフォルクストクトンで生まれた時，父John le Bigodは42歳，母Isabelは21歳であった。約1306年にIdonia Hertfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1332年5月12日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアセットリントンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Bigod(이)가 대략 1285년 영국 노르폴크 스톡턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John le Bigod(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1306년 Idonia Hertford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1332년 5월 12일 이전 영국 요르크실르 세트링턴에서 사망했다.

mn.abt 1285–before 12 May 1332: ойролцоогоор 1285 он–1332 оны Тавдугаар сарын 12–наас өмнө
mn.Stockton, Norfolk, England: Stockton, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Stockton, Norfolk, England, United Kingd: Stockton, Norðfolc, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph Bigod nasceu aproximadamente 1285, em Stockton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John le Bigod, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Isabel, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Idonia Hertford aproximadamente 1306. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 12 de maio de 1332, em Settrington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Bigod родился около 1285 г. в местности стокктон, норфолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John le Bigod было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Isabel, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Idonia Hertford около 1306 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер перед 12 май 1332 г. в местности сеттрингтон, еркшир, Англия.

sm.abt 1285–before 12 May 1332: e tusa o le 1285–a'e le'I oo le 12 Me 1332

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph Bigod nació aproximadamente 1285, en Stockton, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, John le Bigod, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Isabel, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Idonia Hertford aproximadamente 1306. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió antes de 12 de mayo de 1332, en Settrington, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
